reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content:
잘가지고 놀고 너무 좋아해요!
우리 강아지랑 정말 같이 통화하고 문자하고 싶어요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so well and loves it so much! 😭 I really wish I could call and text with my pup ㅠㅠ

reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 미쳐버릴것 같아요,,,
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable I might go crazy,,,

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 핑크핑크 핫핑크 너무 깜찍~
reviews.content_en: Pink pink hot pink, so cute~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 항상 나갈때마다 언니한테 카톡해~ 라고 하지만 폰이 앖다는 슬픈 현실을 깨닫고 선물했습니다.. 가끔 밥 안먹으면 망태할아버지도 부르기 좋아요. 비록 숫자가 9개라서 010을 못누른다는 슬픈점을 제외하고 아주 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: Every time I leave, she asks her unnie 'text me~' but I realized the sad reality that she doesn't have a phone.. Sometimes when she won't eat, she even likes calling out to the goblin grandfather figure. Aside from the sad point that there are only 9 numbers so she can't dial 010, it's really great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
탄탄하고 귀여워요 크기도 작지도 크지도 않고 최고!
색상도 핫핑크에 레트로 디자인 진짜 귀여움 :)
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy and cute! The size is just right, not too small or too big—perfect! 😊 The hot pink color with that retro design is seriously adorable :)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
댕댕폰 넘 귀여워요
집사들 사심잘채운 장난감이에요❤️
reviews.content_en: The phone toy is so cute 💕 It's a toy that satisfies us pet parents' selfish desires ❤️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워서 고양이가 관심 안가져줄거 알면서 사진찍으려고 샀어요😅 색감 쨍하니 사진도 잘나옵니다! 폰 위에는 뾱뾱이 밑에는 바스락이라 강쥐들이 좋아할 장난감이네요!! 친구 강쥐 줘야겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute I bought it just to take photos even though I knew my cat wouldn't be interested 😅 The colors are so vibrant it photographs great! With crinkles on top and rustling sounds underneath, it's a toy the puppers love!! I should gift one to my friend's pup ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content:
엽떼요~~~ 
장난감 너무 귀엽고 사진찍는것도 이뿌지만 강아지가 좋아해오
reviews.content_en: It's so cool~~~ The toy is super cute and great for photos too, but my pup loves it the most!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
개린이날 선물로 구매했어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
별다른 재미가 없어두 잘 갖고놀아서 귀여워주금입니다 ❤️❤️❤️
사진 찍을땨 활용도 있어서 귀여우ㅜ요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift for Dog Day ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Even though it doesn't have anything special, she plays with it so well and it's adorable 🥺❤️❤️❤️ It's useful for taking photos too so it's cute ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 너무 예뻐요! 노즈워크 중수 강쥐에겐 조금 쉬운듯
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty! But it seems a bit easy for my pup who's intermediate at nose work games

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 여부데여? 저 오리육포 다섯개랑 쉬원한 펫밀크 세잔이여. 결제는 누나가 할거애요 네네 감삼다 힛
reviews.content_en: Hey, so like, I got five of those duck jerky treats and three cups of that fresh PET MILK. My older sister is gonna pay for it lol thanks so much! 🎉

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 매우 조아요 >.< 맘에들어요😆🌟❣️
reviews.content_en: I really like it! >.< I love it 😆🌟❣️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 녀부제용~ 친구한테 선물했는데 주인이 더 즐거운 장난감이네요ㅋㅋ 넘귀여워요!! 친구네 강아지 표정이 댕청해서 더 귀여워요..ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: Gave it as a gift to a friend and it's the owner who's having more fun with it ㅋㅋ It's so cute!! My friend's pup's expression is so silly it makes it even cuter..ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 살****
reviews.content:
우리살구 받자마자 잘가지고 놀아요
포켓에 간식넣어줫는데 그건 못빼먹더라구요
컬러감 넘이쁘고 디자인도 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Our Salgu started playing with it right away! I put treats in the pocket and she actually can't get them out 😂 The colors are so pretty and the design is adorable

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
저랑 전화할때 이걸 쓴답니더~후후 
카세트보다 이걸 더 좋아하더라구요! 바스락거려서그런가
reviews.content_en: I use this when I'm on the phone with her~hehe She likes this more than the cassette toy! Maybe it's because of the crinkly sound

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워서 안살수가 없었어요
어린이날 선물로 준비했습니다.
우리 댕댕이가 좋아하길^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute I couldn't resist buying it 💕 I'm preparing it as a gift for Children's Day. I hope our pup loves it ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 잘 가지고 놀아서 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's cute and she plays with it well, so I'm happy~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀엽고 예뻐서 주인 맘대로 구매 해써요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so incredibly cute and pretty I had no choice but to buy it for myself hehe

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요! 우리 강아지가 너무 좋아해요!!!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! Our pup loves it so much!!!

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
옴총 잘 가지고 놀아요
생긴거부터 너무 귀염귀염
reviews.content_en: She absolutely plays with it well! Just the look of it is so adorable and charming

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 레트로 장난감 더 만들어주세요^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! Please make more retro toys like this ^^

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content:
바스락 소리랑 삑삑 소리까지
잘 갖고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: With the crinkly sound and even squeaky sounds, she plays with it so well ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 우리아들 핸드폰 생겼어요 조아하네요>_<
reviews.content_en: Our son got his first phone! He loves it >_<

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워요~ 아리가 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute~ Aria plays with it so well

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 울애기 첫폰이네요 ㅋㅋ넘기여움
reviews.content_en: It's her first phone hehe So cute!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 진짜귀여워요 패키지도 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's really cute and the packaging is pretty too

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The shipping was fast and great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이번 주 주말에 우리 설탕이 2번째 생일이에요. 
생일선물로 구입했습니다!
reviews.content_en: Our Seoltan's 2nd birthday is this weekend. I bought this as a birthday gift!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 제가 귀여워서 샀는데 아무래도 레몬에이드에더 관심을 갖내요^^
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's cute, but she seems more interested in the lemonade toy ^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
강아지용 핸드폰 하나 장만했네요~ ㅎ 
잘 가지고 놀아요~~
reviews.content_en: Got a phone for my pup~ ㅎ She plays with it really well~~

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 기존에 먹던거라서 한동한 안먹이다가 구입했어요~장난감까지~👍
reviews.content_en: It's something she used to eat, so I bought it again after not giving it to her for a while~ and toys too~ 👍

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
물고 다니면서 재밌게 놀아요
노즈워크도 해주니 더 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: She carries it around and plays with it so much! She loves it even more because we can do nose work with it 😊

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 여보세요.   언니오빠가 핸드폰 사주고 연락기다려요.
reviews.content_en: Hello. Big sis/bro, please buy me a phone and wait for my call.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀여워서 구매했어요 생각보다 더 작은데 실용성도 없구요 근데 너무 귀여움!!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's so cute, but it's smaller than I expected and not very practical 😅 But it's so adorable!!!

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 신상나오면 늘 구매하는편인데 지난 장난감들보단 조금 별로예요ㅠ 댕이보단 집사눈에 즐거운 장난감인듯요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I usually buy new toys whenever they come out, but this one isn't as good as the previous ones 😔 Seems like it's more fun for the owner than for my pup haha

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지 노즈워크 장난감 찾아보다 디자인이 너무 이뻐서 구매했습니다!! 강아지도 바스락 소리나서 그런지 좋아하더라구여!! 여기 노즈워크 장난감 너무 좋아해서 여기서만 구매하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a nose work toy for my dog and the design was so pretty that I bought it!! My dog loves the crinkly sound it makes! 🐶 I love the nose work toys here so much that I only buy from this store

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감의 가장 큰 장점은 쉽게 틑어지지 않는다는 겁니다. 최애장난감이예요
reviews.content_en: The best thing about BITE ME toys is that they don't tear easily. It's my favorite toy!

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 배송도빠르고 플립폰 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and the flip phone design is so cute 💕

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 작고 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and it's small and adorable 🐾

reviews.name: 왕****
reviews.content:
강아지카페에서 유행중이라 샀어요
넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's trending at the dog cafe so I bought it 😄 It's so cute!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽잖아요>__<
reviews.content_en: It's literally so cute >__<

reviews.name: 챈****
reviews.content:
애기가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅠㅠㅎㅎ
애기가 작아서 작은거 사줬는데 뿌듯
간식 넣는 칸도 있어서 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
역시 비닐과 뽁뽁 소리는 국룰인가 봅니다 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My baby plays with it so much 😭😂 She's small so I got her the small size and it feels great 💕 It even has a pocket for treats! 😄 Apparently the crinkly vinyl and bubble wrap sounds are a universal favorite haha 😄

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 강아지 키우는 분한테 선물 드렸어요 너무 좋아하세요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a gift to someone with a dog and they loved it so much!! 😄

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 신상 감사합니다 더 사야겠음요 ㅋㅋㅎ
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the new product! I need to buy more lol 😂

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 플립열면 노즈워크 작게 할 수 있는 부분있어서 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: When you open the flip, there's a section for mini nose work which is so cute 🥰

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 ㅋㅋ 던져주면 젤 잘 가져오는 제품임 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute 😂 It's the toy she retrieves the best when I throw it! 😂

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 강아지가 갖고놀기에 튼튼하고 좋습니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's durable and great for my dog to play with 😊

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's cute 🥰 She plays with it really well

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리랑 줄줄줄 뽑혀나오는 장난감 좋아하는데 딱 취향저격이라 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I like toys with crinkly sounds and ones that unravel, and this one is exactly my style so I love it! 💕

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 늘 핸폰에 집중할떈 뭉치에게 미안했는데 핸폰 하나 장만해줘서 기쁩니다!
reviews.content_en: I always felt bad for Mungchi when I was focused on my phone, but I'm so happy I got her a phone toy of her own! 😊
